testcase.name: initializationError
testcase.failure: java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError at java.base/jdk.internal.misc.Unsafe.ensureClassInitialized0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.misc.Unsafe.ensureClassInitialized(Unknown Source) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.acquireMethodAccessor(Unknown Source) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source) at io.qameta.allure.junit5.AllureJunit5.processFixture(AllureJunit5.java:138) at io.qameta.allure.junit5.AllureJunit5.interceptBeforeAllMethod(AllureJunit5.java:100) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(Unknown Source) Caused by: java.lang.RuntimeException: org.postgresql.util.PSQLException: FATAL: password authentication failed for user "salman" at com.ust.sdet.repository.OrderRepository.<init>(OrderRepository.java:23) at com.ust.sdet.tests.orderTest.<clinit>(orderTest.java:20) ... 7 more Caused by: org.postgresql.util.PSQLException: FATAL: password authentication failed for user "salman" at app//org.postgresql.core.v3.ConnectionFactoryImpl.doAuthentication(ConnectionFactoryImpl.java:711) at app//org.postgresql.core.v3.ConnectionFactoryImpl.tryConnect(ConnectionFactoryImpl.java:213) at app//org.postgresql.core.v3.ConnectionFactoryImpl.openConnectionImpl(ConnectionFactoryImpl.java:268) at app//org.postgresql.core.ConnectionFactory.openConnection(ConnectionFactory.java:54) at app//org.postgresql.jdbc.PgConnection.<init>(PgConnection.java:273) at app//org.postgresql.Driver.makeConnection(Driver.java:446) at app//org.postgresql.Driver.connect(Driver.java:298) at platform/java.sql@22.0.2/java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(Unknown Source) at platform/java.sql@22.0.2/java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(Unknown Source) at app//com.ust.sdet.repository.OrderRepository.<init>(OrderRepository.java:17) ... 8 more
